---
name: Bug report
about: Something looks broken or unstyled on Codeforces
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What page?

Full URL (or the URL pattern, e.g. `/contest/*/problem/*`):

## What's wrong?

What you saw vs. what you expected.

## Screenshot

Please attach one — this is a visual extension and a screenshot is usually
worth more than a description.

## Is it a broken selector?

If you can, open the Inspector on the affected element and paste its outer HTML
here. Codeforces changes markup occasionally and that snippet is what lets us
fix it. Scrub your handle if you'd rather not share it.

## Environment

- Firefox version:
- Extension version:
- Theme (dark / light / auto):
- Logged in to Codeforces? yes / no

## Does disabling the extension fix it?

yes / no

## Anything in the console?

`Ctrl+Shift+K` on the page — paste anything mentioning `cf-leetcode`.
